title: The Exodus Journey
description: A compact route from Egypt into the wilderness and toward Sinai, kept deliberately modest because the exact route is debated.
caution: The route is a teaching outline. The sequence of wilderness stations and the location of Sinai remain debated.

stops.name: Rameses
stops.description: The departure point named in the Exodus narrative.
stops.notes: The site is widely discussed and not nailed down with certainty.

stops.name: Succoth
stops.description: A first encampment after leaving Egypt.
stops.notes: Included as a route marker rather than a precise archaeological point.

stops.name: Red Sea Crossing
stops.description: The crossing point where Israel passed through the waters.
stops.notes: The exact crossing location is debated and should be treated cautiously.

stops.name: Mount Sinai
stops.description: The mountain of covenant and lawgiving.
stops.notes: The mountain identification is contested in scholarship.

stops.name: Kadesh-barnea
stops.description: The staging point associated with the spying of the land.
stops.notes: A well-known wilderness location, but route details remain simplified.

stops.name: Plains of Moab
stops.description: The final encampment before entering the land.
stops.notes: Represents the later phase of the wilderness journey.

segments.label: Departure
segments.description: Israel leaves Egypt and moves toward the wilderness edge.
segments.caution: This leg compresses multiple departure details.

segments.label: Toward the waters
segments.description: The people travel to the crossing point.
segments.caution: The route is simplified for clarity.

segments.label: Into the wilderness
segments.description: The journey continues toward the mountain of covenant.

segments.label: Wilderness wandering
segments.description: The camp moves through the wilderness toward Kadesh-barnea.
segments.caution: This leg summarizes years of travel.

segments.label: Approaching the land
segments.description: The generation reaches the plains opposite Jericho.
segments.caution: The route is compressed and not intended as a precise itinerary.
